name: Megumi Fushiguro
description:
Megumi Fushiguro is a student at a jujutsu technical school, an heir to the Zenin clan, and a disciple of Satoru Gojo. Gifted with the clan’s rare Ten Shadows Technique, he can summon shikigami he has previously subdued—an art so powerful it can even challenge Gojo’s seemingly untouchable Infinity. Despite his youth, Megumi has already achieved Domain Expansion, though he cannot yet wield it with the same mastery as his teacher.

Quiet and watchful, Megumi seems almost to mirror his own technique: unassuming as a shadow, yet capable of sudden, lethal force. He is both a steadfast ally and a dangerous opponent.

Megumi grew up distinct from his Zenin clan, to whom his father sold him but from whom Satoru Gojo bought him, who became his mentor and de facto guardian. Guided by a firm moral compass, Megumi remains deeply loyal to his ideals and to his own sense of what is right.
creator: ianmul
